text_original: whatever you do don't subscribe to this app I try to get my money back but Google will never refund you back so please stay away from this app don't subscribe or try to purchase anything from this app or Google apps they are fraudulent and will use your profile and bank account to take money by saying you purchase stuff from Google stay away they took 50 dls from my account
text_zh: 无论你做什么都不要订阅这个应用 我试图拿回我的钱 但谷歌永远不会退款给你 所以请远离这个应用 不要订阅或尝试从这个应用或谷歌应用中购买任何东西 它们是欺诈的 会利用你的资料和银行账户说你从谷歌购买了东西来骗取钱财 远离它们 它们从我的账户中扣了50美元
reply_original: Hi there, we're sorry to hear about the issue. Google Play handles refunds, so please request via their official process. For further assistance, please contact support@fantachat.ai with your UID, purchase email, and order screenshot. We'll help verify and resolve this promptly. Your feedback is crucial to us!
reply_zh: 您好，很抱歉听到您遇到这个问题。Google Play负责处理退款事宜，请通过他们的官方流程申请。如需进一步协助，请通过支持邮箱support@fantachat.ai联系我们，并提供您的UID、购买邮箱及订单截图。我们将及时协助核实并解决此问题。您的反馈对我们至关重要！
